mapper.select: select * from biz_result_file where order_id = #{orderId} and deleted = 0 order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into biz_result_file(order_id, file_name, file_url, file_type, upload_user_id, create_time, deleted) values(#{orderId}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileType}, #{uploadUserId}, #{createTime}, #{deleted})
